title: Dirty Crops
description: This datapack makes crops dirty when you mine them
body:
# Dirty Crops
This datapack makes crops dirty when you mine them

When you mine crops they will be dirty and you have to wash them off in a cauldron with water 


### What this datapack adds
- Dirty Carrot
- Dirty Wheat
  - Dirty Bread
- Dirty Beetroot
- Dirty Potatoes
